label: Subagent • residency handoff passthrough for same-model kinds
query: A scripted same-model subagent that does NOT need the residency handoff.
notes: Model-free. The kind sets needsHandoff=false and vends a PassthroughHandoff; the host must run the body WITHOUT a residency wrap (no unload/reload). The negative complement of scripted-handoff-wraps — together they prove BOTH host branches (wrap + passthrough) deterministically, mirroring the live local→local-same / local→remote / remote→* directions that run in place.
